title: daucus carota var. gingidium
intro: Daucus carota var. gingidium, also known as Japanese carrot or Queen Anne's lace, is a variety of wild carrot that is native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve various health issues. The health benefits of Daucus carota var. gingidium include reducing fever, treating colds and coughs, and alleviating menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Herbal preparations of Daucus carota var. gingidium can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
